nasb.text: Then men will say, ‘Because they forsook the covenant of the Lord, the God of their fathers, which He made with them when He brought them out of the land of Egypt.

esv.text: Then people will say, ‘It is because they abandoned the covenant of the Lord, the God of their fathers, which he made with them when he brought them out of the land of Egypt,

cnv.text: 人就必回答：‘是因為他們離棄了耶和華他們列祖的　神的約，就是耶和華把他們從埃及地領出來的時候，與他們所立的；

ccb.text: 必有人回答说，‘因为这地方的人背弃了他们祖先的上帝耶和华领他们出埃及时与他们所立的约，
